The '''Wall of Dantooine''' was a vast obsidian asteroid field in the [[Dantooine system/Legends|Dantooine system]]. No mining operation had claimed the entire field, as it was too large to manage effectively. Stretching as far as the eye could see, it was a useful landmark for travelers.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]'' {{1st}}
